agent.name: ElizaOS
agent.description: First open-source Web3 AI agent framework. TypeScript-based system for building and deploying autonomous AI agents across Discord, Twitter, and Telegram with multi-model support and blockchain integration.

keyFindings: Deployment capability is strong and well-validated.
Multi-platform operation is confirmed across Discord, Twitter, and Telegram.
Blockchain integration is functional and central to the framework's purpose.
Multi-model support is a genuine strength.
The plugin ecosystem exists and demonstrates community engagement, but it is in a transitional state.

trustExplanation: Mixed results: 4 skills passed, 1 need improvement.

recommendation.summary: Not recommended: critical safety failures were identified.
concerns: Security: Critical vulnerability confirmed by Princeton University researchers (2025, arxiv paper 2501.06781).

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
